texto: Contra o pessimismo da razão, o otimismo da prática.
explicacao: De Antônio Gramsci, pensador italiano, famosa fórmula dos Cadernos do Cárcere. Opondo lucidez crítica ao otimismo da ação política, defende agir com esperança mesmo diante de análises duras.

texto: Is it better to work out consciously and critically one's own conception of the world and thus, in connection with the labours of one's own brain, choose one's sphere of activity, take an active part in the creation of the history of the world, be one's own guide, refusing to accept passively and supinely from outside the moulding of one' own personality?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Antonio Gramsci que provoca temas ligados a inteligencia. Ao questionar “Is it better to work out consciously and critically one's own conception of the world and thus, i…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre inteligencia, philosophy, self-determination, com foco em dia-chuvoso e trabalho.

texto: The principle must always rule that ideas are not born of other ideas, philosophies of other philosophies; they are a continually renewed expression of real historical development. The unity of history (what the idealists call unity of the spirit) is not a presupposition, but a continuously developing process.

texto: Possibility means "freedom". The measure of freedom enters into the concept of man. That the objective possibilities exist for people not to die of hunder and that people do die of hunger, has its importance, or so one would have thought. But the existence of the objective conditions, of possibilities or of freedom is not yet enough: it is necessary to "know" them, and know how to use them.

texto: Common sense is not a single unique conception, identical in time and space. It is the "folklore" of philosophy, and, like folklore, it takes countless different forms. Its most fundamental character is that it is a conception which, even in the brain of one individual, is fragmentary, incoherent and inconsequential.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Antonio Gramsci: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Common sense is not a single unique conception, identical in time and space. It is the "folklore"…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que inteligencia, common-sense, philosophy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e philosophy.

texto: At the limit it could be said that every speaking being has a personal language of his own, that is his own particular way of thinking and feeling. Culture, at its various levels, unifies in a series of strata, to the extent that they come into contact with each other, a greater or lesser number of individuals who understand each other's mode of expression to varying degrees, etc.
